_comment: Chrome Extension Manifest V3. This file tells Chrome everything it needs to know about the extension: what it's called, what permissions it needs, which scripts run where, and what the popup looks like.
name: ShoppyCat
description: Save items from Amazon and AliExpress to your ShoppyCat list, and see what your friends are buying.

background._comment: Service workers replace background pages in MV3. They start when needed and shut down when idle to save resources.

content_scripts._comment: These scripts are injected INTO the Amazon/AliExpress page DOM. They can read and manipulate the page but cannot directly call the Flask API (different origin). They communicate via Chrome messages to background.js.

action._comment: The popup that opens when the user clicks the extension icon in the toolbar.
